title: <div>  •  Example: An exiled player may get a guaranteed skill reroll but lose a
content:
• Example: An exiled player may get a guaranteed skill reroll but lose all team-based advantages.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures factions do not become overpowered.
✔ Encourages loyalty but doesn’t punish betrayal outright.
✔ Creates balance between individual play and teamwork.

📜 3. Reverse Betrayals – How to Redeem Yourself After Exile

📜 Betrayers can seek redemption through sacrifice or trials.

✔ Ways to Redeem Betrayal:
• Perform a Sacrificial Act (Giving up XP, an item, or a major advantage.)
• Publicly Pledge Loyalty Again (The faction votes to let them back in.)
• Undergo a Trial or Duel (Must prove worth in a skill-based competition.)

✔ Why This Matters:
• Exiled players don’t have to stay out forever.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 485 (chunk 485/555)
